# terrible_community_general_kdeconfig (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `path` (String) Path to the config file. If the file does not exist it is created.
- `values` (String) List of values to set.

### Optional

- `backup` (Boolean) Create a backup file.
- `kwriteconfig_path` (String) Path to the kwriteconfig executable. If not specified, Ansible tries to discover it.
